column2: 01: Pucca (both wall and roof are made of pucca material)
02: Pucca-kuccha (either wall or roof is made of pucca material, but others of kuccha material)
03: Kaccha (both wall and roof are made of kuccha material other than material mentioned in Category 4
04: Hut (both wall and roof are made of grass, leaves, mud, un-brunt brick or bamboo)
